title: Create 6+
description: Custom worldgen and Create 6 shape a world built for exploration and engineering. Automation and trains drive progression, turning terrain into a living system.
body:
# Create 6+ | Custom Worldgen & Create Automation

Build-first pack. Fresh terrain. Clean tech. Zero bloat. You explore a reshaped Overworld, then automate everything with Create and a tight addon set, you can even use somme tech mods like Mekanism and many more.

## Core loop

Explore → settle a biome that actually feels new → bootstrap with hand-cranked gizmos → scale to belts, gearboxes, and steam → unlock trains and sequenced assembly → automate food, mob drops, and late-game alloys → ship megaprojects across a real continent.

## World generation

* Tall ranges, deep caverns, wide rivers, realistic coastlines.
* Dense structure pass: ruins, vaults, stronghold variants, improved villages.
* Biome palettes tuned for visibility and building. Rare stuff stays rare.
* Ore layout balanced around Create processing. Caves support large contraptions.
* Nether and End get light-touch upgrades. No theme-park spam.

## Tech stack

* **Create 6** as the spine. Blaze burners, trains, mechanical crafters.
* **Addons (curated 6):**

  * Create: Steam ‘n’ Rails — better rails, stock, and logistics
  * Create: Slice & Dice — crop automation done right
  * Create: Central Kitchen — feed your crew from one line
  * Create: Crafts & Additions — power, gadgets, QoL parts
  * Create: Deco — detailed blocks for factories that look finished
  * Create: Big Cannons — heavy industry for endgame materials and spectacle
  * And many more!

## Progression

* Early game: hand crank, water wheels, andesite age, simple depots.
* Mid game: steam networks, sequenced assembly, superheated alloys.
* Late game: multi-train logistics, bulk ore processing, full food and mob lines, Fusion reactor or near unlimited space in you Backpack.
* Light questbook for signposting. Recipes nudge you but never hard-lock you.

## Performance and stability

* Client: Embeddium + Oculus, FerriteCore, ModernFix.
* Server: chunkload limits, sane view distances, pregen options.
* Configs avoid recipe spam and laggy edge cases.
* Safe for long worlds and SMP.

## Building and aesthetics

* Blocks and palettes aimed at factory beauty.
* Terrain leaves room for megabases and rail corridors.
* Structures double as early loot and late-game set pieces.

## Specs

* **Minecraft 1.20.1, Forge.**
* **Java 17.**
* **Client RAM:** 8–32 GB. **Server:** 6–14 GB (Tested only with 15GB).

## Multiplayer

* Trains are the meta for bulk. Nether portals optional.
* No pay-to-win.

## Why this pack

You want Create to be the main character and the world to be worth crossing by rail. This gives you both, without noise.

**Build. Automate. Expand. Then send it by train.**


PS: If you want the server version, contact me under waldmanuel76@gmail.com.
    Only available for the newest version of the modpack.
